suggestion.rationale: Both records denote the same person: entity_name differs only by spacing and capitalization (De Santis vs DeSantis), which is a minor spelling variant. Entity_type (person) agrees. Evidence places both in the same organizational context (MTA Bridges and Tunnels/TBTA) at different meetings, consistent with different titles/roles over time. No contradicting strong identity fields. Under test 2, the name difference is an abbreviation/spelling variant allowed for merge. The first record is a lifecycle record (date-suffixed id) merging into the durable record.
